title: Trae Builder Config
description: SDK-agnostic build descriptor consumed by trae_build_runner.py and trae_build_mcp.py. Place as `builder.json` in the project root. The legacy name `robin_builder.json` is also accepted for backward compatibility.

sdk.description: Optional descriptive metadata about the project/SDK.

path.description: Path to the build script, relative to the project root. e.g. 'scripts/robin_build_variant.ps1'.

interpreter.description: Interpreter used to run the script. For .ps1 use 'powershell.exe' or 'pwsh'. For .sh use 'bash'. If omitted and path ends with .ps1, powershell is inferred.

execution_policy.description: PowerShell -ExecutionPolicy value, e.g. 'Bypass'. Ignored for non-powershell scripts.

toolchain.description: Free-form toolchain metadata (IDE path, default build target, etc.). Read by build_info, not enforced by the runner.

parameters.description: Ordered list of build parameters. Each becomes a CLI flag passed to the script in the form -<Name> <value>.

name.description: Parameter name; must match a flag the script accepts (e.g. 'Target').

type.description: Declared type (informational; values are stringified when building CLI args).

default.description: Default value used when the caller omits this parameter. Empty string means 'let the script choose'.

presets.description: Named combinations of parameter values for one-click builds.

artifacts.description: Where to scan for build outputs after a build completes.

scan_dirs.description: Directories (relative to project root) to scan. e.g. ['build_variants'].

max_age_hours.description: Only list artifacts modified within this many hours. 0 = no limit.

env.description: Extra environment variables merged into the build subprocess environment.

serial.description: Optional serial port capture settings. When present, enables the serial_list / serial_capture MCP tools to use these defaults. Independent of build.

default_port.description: Default serial port (e.g. 'COM3', '/dev/ttyUSB0'). Empty = auto-detect first available.

baud.description: Baud rate. Telink UART log default 115200; RX data stream often 9600.

encoding.description: Decode bytes to text with this encoding (use 'replace' on error).

capture_dir.description: Optional directory to save capture logs (relative to project root).

flash.description: Optional Telink bdt.exe flashing settings. Independent of build. Enables flash_run / flash_info MCP tools.

default_chip.description: bdt chip prefix, e.g. 'TL721X','B80','TC321X'. Empty = inferred from presets' BuildTarget.

chip_map.description: Map repo chip dir name -> bdt chip prefix, e.g. {'tc122x':'TC122X','B80':'B80'}.

default_input_file.description: Default -i firmware path. Empty = auto-pick latest .bin from build artifacts.
